data: REAL BlueFors healthy telemetry (blizzard), no synthetic normal
reading: Detector trained ONLY on real healthy BlueFors telemetry. The false-alarm rate is a genuine real-hardware number (real held-out healthy windows). Recall is on physics faults injected onto REAL windows (real noise + real baseline + physics perturbation) — the field-standard 'physics-guided augmentation' method, applied to a dilution fridge for the first time. This CANNOT claim real fault classification (no real fault labels exist), only detection.
